target.label: Sandbox-Based Agent Execution (with Epics 1-3 carry-forward baseline)

rationale: Epic 6 coverage is 100% (30/30 ACs FULL). P0 coverage is 100% (19/19), P1 is 100% (7/7), P2 is 100% (1/1), P3 process-only is 100% by design (1/1), NFR is 100% (2/2). No critical, high, medium, or low-priority gaps. No security issues — 13 credential-isolation + input-injection regression guards across Stories 6.1/6.2/6.3 extend the Epics 1-3 NFR-S1 sandbox security boundary. No flaky tests — 0 skipped scaffolds remain in Epic 6 test files (verified by grep against describe.skip/it.skip/test.skip). The 8 real-service env-gated E2E skips (5 new in 6.5 + 3 baseline from prior trace) are not blockers — their ACs are independently covered at unit/integration level; they require PLAYWRIGHT_REAL_SERVICE=1 plus operational prerequisites to activate the real-service tier. All 5 stories (6-1 through 6-5) are 'done' per sprint-status.yaml. Host-based execution (Epic 3 DP-2 deviation) cleanly migrated to architecture-prescribed sandbox-based model — @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk import, AGENT_WORKDIR, and tmpdir() all removed from AgentService (verified by grep at HEAD dbac901). Epics 1-3 baseline (2026-07-11 PASS, 106/106 FULL) preserved.
